message:
fix(concurrency): harden ensure_known_metadata_defaults for concurrent readers (#243)

Fresh-eyes review found that INSERT...SELECT...WHERE NOT EXISTS still
acquires a write lock even when zero rows are inserted. Read-only
commands (br list, br show, etc.) calling open_with_timeout would get
instant SQLITE_BUSY if a writer was active, since busy_timeout=0.

Fix: read-first pattern — check metadata_key_exists (no write lock),
only INSERT if missing, and swallow transient BUSY errors. Also fix
stale comment in open_with_timeout and doc accuracy in blocking_write_lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
